title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 71.611 - Certain villages prohibited from imposing a license tax in excess of $10,000 per license
text:
71.611.  Certain villages prohibited from imposing a license tax in excess of $10,000 per license. — Notwithstanding any other provision of law to the contrary, after March 31, 2004, no village with less than one thousand three hundred inhabitants shall impose a license tax in excess of ten thousand dollars per license.
(L. 2003 S.B. 11)
